target.name: Beyond Aero
target.founder: Valéry Manuel, Eloa Guillotin, Hugo Tarlé

methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $44M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Transportation (found 1 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 5 same-sector peers exist in Transportation, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: REGENT Craft
private.rationale: Same sector (Transportation), same stage (Series A), post-money $270M

data.narrative:
Beyond Aero is a Series A transportation company founded by Valéry Manuel, Eloa Guillotin, and Hugo Tarl­é, having raised $44M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a universe of 8 private peers in the Transportation sector, including companies such as REGENT Craft, Rivian, The Boring Company, Einride, and Harbinger. No public comparables exist in this frontier segment.

The analysis applies a single triangulation method: Stage-Progression. Given the absence of sufficient same-stage or adjacent-stage peers meeting minimum statistical thresholds (fewer than three qualifying datapoints), a peer-median approach was deemed inapplicable. The Stage-Progression method uses the $44M total raised as a valuation proxy and applies a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical of Series A-to-next-stage progression, implying a valuation of $88M.

The triangulated range supportable by available methodology spans $75M (low) to $101M (high), with a median of $88M. This range reflects a narrow analytical foundation: only one method is applicable given data constraints. Key uncertainties include the absence of late-stage comparable transaction data in the Transportation frontier-tech space and the reliance on historical stage-to-stage multipliers that may not capture this company's specific capital intensity, technical risk, or market trajectory. Additional market data or executed peer transactions would materially strengthen confidence in any valuation range.
